title: Aalst, East Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aalst, East Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aalst is a city in East Flanders with a population of 88,000. Famous for its irreverent Carnival parade (UNESCO-listed), this East Flemish city offers affordable housing and a strong sense of local identity.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
